title: Protein extraction from aortas or VSMCs for Western blot
author: Muthi Ikawati
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.nxadfie

steps.title: Thaw frozen aorta in a 37°C...
steps.instruction: Thaw frozen aorta in a 37°C waterbath, mince on ice, and pool aortas from 3-4 mice in a single microtube. For VMSCs, wash cells with phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) three times, aspirate the PBS thoroughly.

steps.title: Prepare SMAD lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare SMAD lysis buffer: 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.6, 1% Triton X-100, 100 mM NaCl, 2 mM EDTA, 10% v/v glycerol containing 50 mM NaF, 20 mM Na 4 P 2 0 7 , 2 mM Na 3 VO 4 , and 1x protease inhibitor cocktail (Nacalai Tesque)

steps.title: Lyse pooled minced aortas or VSMCs...
steps.instruction: Lyse pooled minced aortas or VSMCs in 100 or 150 μl lysis buffer for each microtube (around 30 mg tissue) or 35 mm dish, respectively.

steps.title: Use a homogenizer (for aortas) followed...
steps.instruction: Use a homogenizer (for aortas) followed by a sonicator to further lyse the tissue. Use a sonicator to process VSMC samples.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 x g for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 x g for 10 min at 4°C. Undetermined 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer supernatant into a new microtube
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant into a new microtube.

steps.title: Measure protein concentration by using Pierce 660nm Protein Assay Reagent
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration by using Pierce 660nm Protein Assay Reagent. Make a BSA standard curve as well to plot the absorbance into the concentration value. Pierce™ 660nm Protein Assay Reagent Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #22660 Pierce™ 660nm Protein Assay Reagent Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #22660

steps.title: Add 5x SDS loading dye, boil...
steps.instruction: Add 5x SDS loading dye, boil at 95ºC for 3-5 min. 00:03:00 Undetermined
